ksa_text: Manage data service level agreements and operational commitments with internal consumers, including SLA definition, performance measurement, monitoring program execution, breach reporting, and service improvement planning.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-011 (OP, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4237 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.424, dcwf=0.391, eu_ai_act=0.379) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: OP domain KSA OP-T-011 excluded at composite 0.4237, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4237 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4237 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a OP (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Geospatial Data Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. OP KSA with composite 0.4237 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-011 (OP, composite 0.4237) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4237 with signal across ddat=0.424, dcwf=0.391, eu_ai_act=0.379 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4237, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
